items.title: EPAM 3 Years Interview Experience | Java Spring Boot
items.description: A comprehensive collection of real interview questions and answers from an EPAM Java Developer interview. Ideal for candidates with 3 years of experience, covering Core Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, and Memory Management.

items.title: Memory Management
items.description: Virtual memory, paging, segmentation, TLB, page replacement algorithms, and Java heap management with GC fundamentals.

items.title: NTT Data Java Developer Interview Experience & Questions [15 LPA+]
items.description: A detailed collection of real interview questions and answers from an NTT Data Java Developer interview. Ideal for candidates with 3.8 years of experience, covering Multithreading, Core Java internals, Spring Boot, and Security.

items.title: Wipro 3 Years Interview Experience [Java Springboot]
items.description: A detailed collection of real interview questions and answers from a Wipro Java Developer interview. Ideal for candidates with ~3 years of experience, covering JVM Internals, Memory Management, Spring Boot, and Core Java snippets.
